title: Virtual Assets Red Flags and Indicators Guidance for Financial Institutions
summary: Applies to CBB-supervised licensees and provides red flags for detecting and reporting suspicious activity involving virtual assets and virtual asset service providers, including exchange activity, transfers, custody, anonymity-enhancing services, mixers, tumblers, dark-net exposure, unlicensed VASPs, private wallets and cross-border VA movement.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: AML guidance for virtual assets and VASPs.
theme_notes.digital_finance.virtual_assets: AML guidance for virtual assets and VASPs.

notes: Related instruments: Crypto-Asset Module, AML and financial crime modules, FATF virtual asset guidance
